## Architecture Overview

The project is organized into the following categories:

### Configuration (1 files)

Core configuration files that define project settings, dependencies, and build configuration.

### Controllers (4 files)

API controllers and route handlers that process HTTP requests.

### Services (2 files)

Business logic layer containing use cases and domain services.

### Database (2 files)

Database access layer including repositories and migrations.

### Infrastructure (3 files)

Deployment and infrastructure configuration (Docker, scripts).

### Documentation (3 files)

Project documentation and guides.

### Other (5 files)

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- Docker and Docker Compose installed

### Running the Project

Using Docker Compose:
```bash
docker-compose up -d
```

Using run scripts:
```bash
# Linux/Mac
./run.sh

# Windows
run.bat
```

For detailed setup instructions, see the main README.md file.
